title: Golem
description: The modpack for the social deduction game Golem
body:
Golem is a social deduction game where you either work together to build a golem or seek to destroy those that do.

This is a client-side modpack for a server. It includes a few performance mods and SimpleVoiceChat. This modpack will allow you to stay up to date with the version of Minecraft and SimpleVoiceChat which are expected to be used on the server. It's not very interesting, and probably not worth installing unless you plan to play Golem.
